items.how_used: 论文在Global Assumptions和Model 1 Assumptions中明确列出了多条假设，如My City是美国城市、人口影响、犯罪均匀分布等，为后续建模提供基础。
items.source_excerpt: Global Assumptions: 1. My City is a city in the United States of America. ... 2. My City, which has a population of 2.8 million people, is impacted by a metropolitan area of an additional approximately 6 million people. ...

items.how_used: 论文在Model 2中利用芝加哥历史GDP和犯罪率数据，通过线性回归分析两者之间的相关性，并应用于My City。

variables.C_m: 每种主要犯罪每10万人两周内的发生率

items.source_excerpt: Using GDP and crime data for several years in Chicago’s past, a significant correlation was determined between the crime rate and the GDP of Chicago, which was then concluded to also apply to My City due to their similarities.

items.how_used: 论文构建了加权求和的安全评级模型，R = Σ(W_m × C_m)，其中权重W_m基于美国量刑委员会对每种犯罪的中位刑期计算。

variables.C_m: 每种主要犯罪每10万人两周内的发生率

items.source_excerpt: The model that was used to best represent that safety ranking was R = Σ(W_m × C_m) in which R was the rating of the metropolitan area and was calculated with the summation of each of the major crime’s rate per 100,000 people for two weeks multiplied by its individual weights.

items.how_used: 论文计算了My City的z-score为-0.1620636，并据此得出其比56.43%的城市更安全，使用z-score作为安全性的相对度量。
items.source_excerpt: The calculated safety rating for My City was 1370.9268 and the mean of the FBI metropolitan area ratings was 1462.467 with a standard deviation of 564.8396. As a result, the z‑score of My City in relation to the population of FBI data was ‑0.1620636, meaning that it was safer than 56.43 percent of cities.

items.how_used: 论文使用了直方图（Graph 2和Graph 3）展示犯罪数据分布，并标注了正态分布曲线，用于说明数据近似正态分布。
items.source_excerpt: Graph 2: Number of Crimes per 100000 per Two Weeks under Hierarchy Rule

items.how_used: 论文引言部分通过具体案例（2002年狙击手事件）引出犯罪问题，并引用FBI数据说明犯罪统计的重要性，结构清晰。
items.source_excerpt: In October of 2002, two men brought fear in the hearts of Americans as they claimed the lives of ten innocent bystanders and critically injured three others over a period of twenty‑three days. ... This paper thus seeks to apply the abundant amount of gathered criminal statistics to the safeness of cities and metropolitan areas.

items.how_used: 论文整体结构遵循IMRaD格式：Restatement（引言）、Model（方法）、Results（结果）、Conclusion（结论），并包含附录。
items.source_excerpt: Restatement of Problem ... Introduction ... Model 1 ... Model 2 ... Conclusion
